steps.action: Run ExportApprovalServiceTest (7 tests) covering create, list pending, approve, reject, download gate
steps.expected: All 7 tests pass: createRequest persists PENDING, listPending maps user/status, approve sets APPROVED + metadata, reject sets REJECTED + reason, resolveDownload blocks unapproved when gate enabled, resolveDownload allows approved when gate enabled, resolveDownload bypasses gate when disabled

steps.action: Run AdminSettingsControllerApprovalsContractTest (4 tests) covering approvals dashboard with export requests
steps.expected: All 4 tests pass: approvals is read-only transactional, export approvals appear in unified dashboard alongside credit/payroll, null/unknown status fallbacks handled, payroll fallback reference used

steps.action: Run ReportControllerContractTest (5 tests) confirming ReportController integrates ExportApprovalService
steps.expected: All 5 tests pass confirming controller contract including POST /api/v1/exports/request and GET /api/v1/exports/{id}/download endpoints

steps.action: Verify source code: SystemSettingsService has erp.export.require-approval config with persistence, ExportApprovalService enforces PENDING->APPROVED->download flow, admin endpoints gated with ROLE_ADMIN/ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN
steps.expected: Export approval gate toggleable via settings API PUT /api/v1/admin/settings with exportApprovalRequired field. Export lifecycle: create (PENDING) -> approve/reject -> download gated on APPROVED status when setting enabled
steps.observed: SystemSettingsService.isExportApprovalRequired() backed by volatile boolean + persisted SystemSetting. ExportApprovalService: createRequest creates PENDING, approve sets APPROVED, reject sets REJECTED with reason, resolveDownload checks approval gate and returns 403-equivalent ApplicationException if not APPROVED. AdminSettingsController exposes GET /api/v1/admin/exports/pending, PUT /api/v1/admin/exports/{id}/approve, PUT /api/v1/admin/exports/{id}/reject with PreAuthorize(ROLE_ADMIN,ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN). Export requests appear in unified GET /api/v1/admin/approvals dashboard.

evidence.network: Validated via unit tests: POST /api/v1/exports/request -> PENDING, GET /api/v1/admin/exports/pending -> list, PUT /api/v1/admin/exports/{id}/approve -> APPROVED, PUT /api/v1/admin/exports/{id}/reject -> REJECTED, GET /api/v1/exports/{id}/download -> gated on approval status
evidence.testResults: ExportApprovalServiceTest: 7/7 pass, AdminSettingsControllerApprovalsContractTest: 4/4 pass, ReportControllerContractTest: 5/5 pass. Total: 16/16 pass.

steps.action: Run ChangelogServiceTest (6 tests) covering create, update, list, latest-highlighted, soft-delete, not-found
steps.expected: All 6 tests pass: create persists entry with semver/title/body/highlighted and audit, list returns newest-first paginated, latestHighlighted returns most recent highlighted, latestHighlighted throws BUSINESS_ENTITY_NOT_FOUND when none, softDelete marks deleted=true with timestamp + audit, update modifies existing entry + audit

steps.action: Run TS_RuntimeChangelogServiceExecutableCoverageTest (3 tests) covering full CRUD lifecycle, not-found, and pagination bounds
steps.expected: All 3 tests pass: full lifecycle (create->update->list->latestHighlighted->softDelete), latestHighlighted throws when empty, list respects max page size 100 and negative page clamped to 0

steps.action: Verify SecurityConfig permits /api/v1/changelog and /api/v1/changelog/latest-highlighted without authentication
steps.expected: Both public endpoints are in permitAll() list alongside auth endpoints

steps.action: Verify ChangelogEntryRequest enforces semver validation via @Pattern regex
steps.expected: version field has @NotBlank @Pattern(semver regex) @Size(max=32), title has @NotBlank @Size(max=255), body has @NotBlank, isHighlighted is optional Boolean
steps.observed: ChangelogEntryRequest record has full Jakarta Bean Validation: semver pattern ^(0|[1-9]\d*)\.(0|[1-9]\d*)\.(0|[1-9]\d*)(?:-...) on version field confirmed

steps.action: Verify ChangelogController CRUD endpoints: POST /api/v1/admin/changelog (create), PUT /api/v1/admin/changelog/{id} (update), DELETE /api/v1/admin/changelog/{id} (soft-delete), GET /api/v1/changelog (public list), GET /api/v1/changelog/latest-highlighted (public highlighted)
steps.expected: Admin endpoints require ROLE_ADMIN or ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN via @PreAuthorize. Public endpoints have no auth annotation. List returns PageResponse<ChangelogEntryResponse> sorted newest-first. Delete returns 204 No Content.
steps.observed: ChangelogController confirmed: POST/PUT/DELETE under /api/v1/admin/changelog with @PreAuthorize("hasAuthority('ROLE_ADMIN') or hasAuthority('ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN')"). GET /api/v1/changelog returns paginated PageResponse. GET /api/v1/changelog/latest-highlighted returns single entry. Delete returns ResponseEntity.noContent().

steps.action: Verify ChangelogEntry entity has proper JPA mapping with all required fields
steps.expected: Entity maps to changelog_entries table with id, version_label, title, body (TEXT), published_at, created_by, highlighted, deleted, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
steps.observed: ChangelogEntry.java confirmed with @Entity @Table(name='changelog_entries'), all columns mapped with proper types and nullable constraints. Flyway migration V40__changelog_entries.sql exists.

evidence.network: Validated via unit tests: POST /api/v1/admin/changelog -> creates entry with semver, GET /api/v1/changelog?page=0&size=20 -> paginated newest-first, GET /api/v1/changelog/latest-highlighted -> most recent highlighted entry, PUT /api/v1/admin/changelog/{id} -> updates entry, DELETE /api/v1/admin/changelog/{id} -> 204 soft-delete

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-ADMIN-003 (Export approval gate): 16 unit tests covering full export request lifecycle (create PENDING -> admin approve/reject -> download gated on approval status when erp.export.require-approval enabled), unified approvals dashboard integration, and ReportController export endpoints all pass. VAL-ADMIN-005 (Versioned changelog system): 9 unit tests covering full CRUD lifecycle (create with semver validation, update, soft-delete, paginated public listing newest-first, latest-highlighted endpoint), public endpoint access without authentication confirmed in SecurityConfig, semver @Pattern validation on ChangelogEntryRequest confirmed.
